payload.description: Financial and Ridership Report (Information Item) for MTA Bridges and Tunnels, including Statement of Operations, traffic volume and revenue, toll revenue collection rates, and position counts.

tool_args.label: Vehicle Toll Revenue Variance Reason

payload.claim_text: Unfavorable results are primarily due to lower traffic volume.
payload.subject: Vehicle Toll Revenue

tool_args.label: Investment Income Variance Reason

payload.claim_text: Higher than anticipated short-term investment returns on fund balances.
payload.subject: Investment Income

tool_args.label: Overtime Variance Reason

payload.claim_text: Higher expenses were largely due to higher overtime required for vacancy/absentee coverage.
payload.subject: Overtime

tool_args.label: Fuel Variance Reason

payload.claim_text: Higher expenses primarily due to Higher-than-forecasted gasoline prices for non-revenue vehicles, and heating fuel costs.
payload.subject: Fuel

payload.missing_information: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Current month's actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.
